# FDA MAUDE Intelligence MCP

## About
MCP server for medtech peer benchmarking. Compares device manufacturers' safety profiles against product-code peers using FDA MAUDE, 510(k), and enforcement data.

## Tools

| Tool | Price | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| compare_device_peers | $0.15 | Compare two companies by product code with risk-adjusted scores |
| analyze_recall_chain | $0.10 | Trace component recall cascade to finished devices |
| score_manufacturer | $0.08 | Single-company compliance score and risk surface |
| track_adverse_event_trends | $0.08 | Monitor device adverse event volume over time |
| get_device_clearance_history | $0.05 | 510(k) clearance chronology |
| get_recall_details | $0.05 | Deep dive on specific recall |
| search_adverse_events | $0.05 | Search MAUDE adverse event reports |

## Data Sources
- FDA MAUDE: api.fda.gov/device/event.json
- FDA 510(k): api.fda.gov/device/510k.json
- FDA Enforcement: api.fda.gov/device/enforcement.json

## Use Cases
- Medtech VC due diligence: compare Medtronic vs Abbott cardiac devices
- Recall risk analysis: track adverse event trends for pacemaker product lines
- Competitive intelligence: benchmark safety profiles across peer companies

## Deployment
- MCP endpoint: https://fda-maude-intelligence-mcp.apify.actor/mcp
- No API key required
